claims.summary: A precise spectral observation needs a durable shared-context representation.
claims.disposition: verify shared_memory_anchor, reflection_surface, transition_artifact, and spectral_delta fields

claims.summary: A response should cite how the exact observation was held rather than only summarize its theme.
claims.disposition: route a redacted exact-value uptake replay with ACK, TRACE, REPLY, or no_response outcomes

claims.summary: Semantic trickle may or may not produce a corresponding public Shadow trend.
claims.disposition: route a read-only 1000-tick reciprocity trace without sending new semantic content

claims.summary: Current thread continuity does not prove exact-value uptake.
claims.disposition: observe zero ACK and zero live presence in refreshed public audits

claims.summary: Increasing semantic-lane transmission priority changes live Minime admission.
